revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:筥崎宮, en:Hakozaki Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/17776233 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:筥崎宮 | revid=17776233 --> 「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」というのは本当でしょうか? 要約に書かれていた『角川日本地名大辞典（福岡県）』にそのように書かれていたのでしょうか。手元の資料（『神道事典』『神社辞典』ほか）はいづれも「筥崎宮」を見出しとし、「筥崎八幡宮」は「別称」としています。当の[http://www.hakozakigu.or.jp 筥崎宮のサイト]でも、トップページのタイトルに「筥崎八幡宮」の名前が見える他は全て「筥崎宮」の名称が使用されています。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年1月18日 (金) 15:37 (UTC) :私も「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」という記載については疑義を感じます。上述の筥崎宮のサイトの由緒の文章それ自体に「筥崎宮は筥崎八幡宮とも称し」とありますので。訂正すべきだと思います。それと、「遷座'''された'''」「'''御'''神前」「亀山上皇が「敵国降伏」を'''御'''祈願'''なさり'''」などの表現は主観的じゃないかと感じます。確かに尊称を用いる心持ちというのは感覚的には分からなくもありませんが、あくまでも百科事典での記載ですので、やや場違いな雰囲気があります。--[[利用者:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年1月19日 (土) 17:21 (UTC) ::特に異見が出なかったので修正しました。--[[利用者:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年2月3日 (日) 15:23 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1212603857 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Hakozaki Shrine | revid=1212603857 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid |shinto=y}} }}
==Questionable sentence== The [http://yokanavi.com/eg/landmark/index/160 Fukuoka/Hakata Tourist Information website] says: :"This is one of the three major shrines of Hachiman god, along with Iwashimizu Hachiman shrine and Usa Hachiman shrine." Without more information, the validity of this sentence is unconvincing. I've posted it here in hopes that someone knowing more than me can help shed further light on this interesting claim.
There is an arguably relevant thread at [[Talk:Iwashimizu Hachiman-gū#Three top shrines]] ...? --[[User:Tenmei|Tenmei]] ([[User talk:Tenmei|talk]]) 22:30, 19 February 2009 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) =World War 2= Did the losers in [[WW2]] pray here too? <!-- Template:Unsigned IP --><small class="autosigned">— Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/106.131.160.145|106.131.160.145]] ([[User talk:106.131.160.145#top|talk]]) 05:06, 18 November 2016 (UTC)</small> <!--Autosigned by SineBot--> :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/17776233 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:筥崎宮 | revid=17776233 --> 「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」というのは本当でしょうか? 要約に書かれていた『角川日本地名大辞典（福岡県）』にそのように書かれていたのでしょうか。手元の資料（『神道事典』『神社辞典』ほか）はいづれも「筥崎宮」を見出しとし、「筥崎八幡宮」は「別称」としています。当の[http://www.hakozakigu.or.jp 筥崎宮のサイト]でも、トップページのタイトルに「筥崎八幡宮」の名前が見える他は全て「筥崎宮」の名称が使用されています。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年1月18日 (金) 15:37 (UTC) :私も「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」という記載については疑義を感じます。上述の筥崎宮のサイトの由緒の文章それ自体に「筥崎宮は筥崎八幡宮とも称し」とありますので。訂正すべきだと思います。それと、「遷座'''された'''」「'''御'''神前」「亀山上皇が「敵国降伏」を'''御'''祈願'''なさり'''」などの表現は主観的じゃないかと感じます。確かに尊称を用いる心持ちというのは感覚的には分からなくもありませんが、あくまでも百科事典での記載ですので、やや場違いな雰囲気があります。--[[利用者:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年1月19日 (土) 17:21 (UTC) ::特に異見が出なかったので修正しました。--[[利用者:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年2月3日 (日) 15:23 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1212603857 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Hakozaki Shrine | revid=1212603857 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid |shinto=y}} }}
==Questionable sentence== The [http://yokanavi.com/eg/landmark/index/160 Fukuoka/Hakata Tourist Information website] says: :"This is one of the three major shrines of Hachiman god, along with Iwashimizu Hachiman shrine and Usa Hachiman shrine." Without more information, the validity of this sentence is unconvincing. I've posted it here in hopes that someone knowing more than me can help shed further light on this interesting claim.
There is an arguably relevant thread at [[Talk:Iwashimizu Hachiman-gū#Three top shrines]] ...? --[[User:Tenmei|Tenmei]] ([[User talk:Tenmei|talk]]) 22:30, 19 February 2009 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) =World War 2= Did the losers in [[WW2]] pray here too? <!-- Template:Unsigned IP --><small class="autosigned">— Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/106.131.160.145|106.131.160.145]] ([[User talk:106.131.160.145#top|talk]]) 05:06, 18 November 2016 (UTC)</small> <!--Autosigned by SineBot--> :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q714742]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/17776233 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:筥崎宮 | revid=17776233 --> 「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」というのは本当でしょうか? 要約に書かれていた『角川日本地名大辞典（福岡県）』にそのように書かれていたのでしょうか。手元の資料（『神道事典』『神社辞典』ほか）はいづれも「筥崎宮」を見出しとし、「筥崎八幡宮」は「別称」としています。当の[http://www.hakozakigu.or.jp 筥崎宮のサイト]でも、トップページのタイトルに「筥崎八幡宮」の名前が見える他は全て「筥崎宮」の名称が使用されています。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年1月18日 (金) 15:37 (UTC) :私も「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」という記載については疑義を感じます。上述の筥崎宮のサイトの由緒の文章それ自体に「筥崎宮は筥崎八幡宮とも称し」とありますので。訂正すべきだと思います。それと、「遷座'''された'''」「'''御'''神前」「亀山上皇が「敵国降伏」を'''御'''祈願'''なさり'''」などの表現は主観的じゃないかと感じます。確かに尊称を用いる心持ちというのは感覚的には分からなくもありませんが、あくまでも百科事典での記載ですので、やや場違いな雰囲気があります。--[[User:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年1月19日 (土) 17:21 (UTC) ::特に異見が出なかったので修正しました。--[[User:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年2月3日 (日) 15:23 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1212603857 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Hakozaki Shrine | revid=1212603857 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid |shinto=y}} }}
==Questionable sentence== The [http://yokanavi.com/eg/landmark/index/160 Fukuoka/Hakata Tourist Information website] says: :"This is one of the three major shrines of Hachiman god, along with Iwashimizu Hachiman shrine and Usa Hachiman shrine." Without more information, the validity of this sentence is unconvincing. I've posted it here in hopes that someone knowing more than me can help shed further light on this interesting claim.
There is an arguably relevant thread at [[Talk:Iwashimizu Hachiman-gū#Three top shrines]] ...? --[[User:Tenmei|Tenmei]] ([[User talk:Tenmei|talk]]) 22:30, 19 February 2009 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) =World War 2= Did the losers in [[WW2]] pray here too? <!-- Template:Unsigned IP --><small class="autosigned">— Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/106.131.160.145|106.131.160.145]] ([[User talk:106.131.160.145#top|talk]]) 05:06, 18 November 2016 (UTC)</small> <!--Autosigned by SineBot--> :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q714742]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hakozaki_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hakozaki_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/17776233 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:筥崎宮 | revid=17776233 --> 「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」というのは本当でしょうか? 要約に書かれていた『角川日本地名大辞典（福岡県）』にそのように書かれていたのでしょうか。手元の資料（『神道事典』『神社辞典』ほか）はいづれも「筥崎宮」を見出しとし、「筥崎八幡宮」は「別称」としています。当の[http://www.hakozakigu.or.jp 筥崎宮のサイト]でも、トップページのタイトルに「筥崎八幡宮」の名前が見える他は全て「筥崎宮」の名称が使用されています。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年1月18日 (金) 15:37 (UTC) :私も「正式名称筥崎八幡宮」という記載については疑義を感じます。上述の筥崎宮のサイトの由緒の文章それ自体に「筥崎宮は筥崎八幡宮とも称し」とありますので。訂正すべきだと思います。それと、「遷座'''された'''」「'''御'''神前」「亀山上皇が「敵国降伏」を'''御'''祈願'''なさり'''」などの表現は主観的じゃないかと感じます。確かに尊称を用いる心持ちというのは感覚的には分からなくもありませんが、あくまでも百科事典での記載ですので、やや場違いな雰囲気があります。--[[User:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年1月19日 (土) 17:21 (UTC) ::特に異見が出なかったので修正しました。--[[User:Pontafon|Pontafon]] 2008年2月3日 (日) 15:23 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1212603857 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Hakozaki Shrine | revid=1212603857 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid |shinto=y}} }}
==Questionable sentence== The [http://yokanavi.com/eg/landmark/index/160 Fukuoka/Hakata Tourist Information website] says: :"This is one of the three major shrines of Hachiman god, along with Iwashimizu Hachiman shrine and Usa Hachiman shrine." Without more information, the validity of this sentence is unconvincing. I've posted it here in hopes that someone knowing more than me can help shed further light on this interesting claim.
There is an arguably relevant thread at [[Talk:Iwashimizu Hachiman-gū#Three top shrines]] ...? --[[User:Tenmei|Tenmei]] ([[User talk:Tenmei|talk]]) 22:30, 19 February 2009 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) =World War 2= Did the losers in [[WW2]] pray here too? <!-- Template:Unsigned IP --><small class="autosigned">— Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/106.131.160.145|106.131.160.145]] ([[User talk:106.131.160.145#top|talk]]) 05:06, 18 November 2016 (UTC)</small> <!--Autosigned by SineBot--> :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q714742]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
